description: Generated code uses update() at root with a multi-location object to fan out a new post.
notes: Skill playbook 'three write modes': update at root is the fan-out mechanism. The generated code must call update on the root ref with at least two paths in a single object. Grounding via final-runtime/run-summary-ok ensures the code runs without throwing under the run-once tool, which is what the playbook says verifies the work.
prompt: Generate client code that creates a new post and writes it atomically to /posts/{id}, /post-summaries/{id}, and /user-posts/{uid}/{id} in a single fan-out update. Use the modular Firebase Web SDK.
